title: Raw tier + raw->block decomposition front-end — ingest heterogeneous source files, preserve originals, decompose into typed source-blocks (the data-room ingestion step)
description: The one genuinely-missing capability for the data-room generalization (FGAP-110): pi-context operates on already-typed JSON blocks; it has no front-end that walks a folder tree, reads heterogeneous raw source files (PDF / deck / transcript / spreadsheet / email / md), PRESERVES the originals, and DECOMPOSES them into typed source-blocks (inventory rows that point at the preserved original via path + metadata — the block is the inventory row, not the file content). This is the 'build me the room / source inventory' first step of the data-room workflow ('raw: then decompose into blocks'). The decomposition is the constrained agent's 'finds' work: it produces CANDIDATE blocks that enter the RAW tier marked invalid + not-current (un-audited) — they become valid+current only via the separate human-in-the-loop flip in FGAP-110 (agent finds, human decides). Feeds FGAP-110 (provides the raw items the valid/current gate curates) and underpins the data-room artifacts (source inventory, conflict log, missing-context, duplicates) which are then typed blocks + closure-table edges over the decomposed source-blocks.

evidence.reference: 'find the relevant materials, preserve the originals, build me a data inventory... summarize every source before you synthesize. do not write the deliverable yet' — the ingestion/decomposition step; 'raw: then decompose into blocks'
appendToBlock / writeBlock are the write target for decomposed source-blocks; the front-end that produces them from raw files does not exist

impact: Without ingestion, the data-room generalization (FGAP-110) has nothing to curate — the substrate can only hold hand-authored blocks, not a decomposed source set. The 'first prompt is build the room, not do the thing' workflow (structurally antagonistic to hallucination) is unreachable for general knowledge work; pi-context stays software-project-only in practice even with the valid/current machinery.
canonical_vocabulary: source ingestion + provenance-preserving decomposition (raw -> typed inventory blocks)
proposed_resolution: Define: (1) a raw tier (preserved originals + a manifest) distinct from the typed-block tier; (2) a decomposition contract for a constrained JIT agent — walk tree, read raw, emit candidate source-blocks (path/type/date/authority-guess/supports/limitations) that point at preserved originals and enter marked invalid+not-current; (3) the source-block kind(s) shipped as a conception pack (intersects the data-room conception, FGAP-110). Agent finds, never auto-promotes; promotion is FGAP-110's human-in-the-loop flip. Open: how much decomposition is in-engine vs a dispatched agent's job; heterogeneous-file reading (the harness/agent reads PDFs/decks, not pi-context core). Needs more thinking alongside FGAP-110.
